data.name: Boundless Lust
data.detailed_description:
Introducing "Boundless Lust" – the captivating visual novel game created by Farix. In "Boundless Lust," players make choices that shape the storyline, leading to different outcomes. Dive into a rich, story-driven experience.

Story:
Ava, 27, and Ethan, 30, met while working together—Ava as a secretary and Ethan as a financial advisor and then they got married. After a year of marriage, Ethan landed a great job, and the couple moved to a new city for better opportunities and a fresh start. Now, many life-changing events await them, and the outcome of their story depends on the choices you make.

Farix has poured dedication into ensuring "Boundless Lust" delivers top-notch quality. The game features compelling narratives, intriguing characters, and unexpected twists.

"Boundless Lust" isn't just a game; it's an immersive storytelling experience crafted with care. For those eager to embark on this adventure.

data.short_description: Introducing "Boundless Lust" – the captivating visual novel game created by Farix. In "Boundless Lust," players make choices that shape the storyline, leading to different outcomes. Dive into a rich, story-driven experience.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista or higher
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista or higher
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.6 or later
  • 處理器: Intel based or M1 under Rosetta
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
